decision: For Tobit, keep active KJV/NABRE/DRB lanes only where the bound source witness has the displayed book/chapter/verse address. Remove copied or source-absent active lane text rather than carrying it as synthetic text.

KJV.policy: KJV active Tobit rows must exactly match the bound KJV source rows. Active KJV rows with no source row are removed as source-absent lane contamination.

NABRE.policy: NABRE active Tobit rows must exactly match the bound NABRE source rows. Active NABRE rows with no source row are removed as source-absent lane contamination.

DRB.policy: DRB active Tobit rows map to source chapters 1-14 only. DRB source chapter 0 is introductory/title material and remains source-present inactive. Active DRB 10:14 is removed because there is no bound DRB source row at 10:14.

blockedOrUnresolvedLanes.NRSV: Active NRSV Tobit remains unverified pending approved source witness/status.
blockedOrUnresolvedLanes.rawText: Active rawText remains unverified and requires classification before full Tobit trust.
blockedOrUnresolvedLanes.Rotherham: Active Rotherham rows are unexpected under current matrix assumptions and require separate source/status classification.

nextRequiredWork: Run bounded Tobit lane cleanup under this policy.
Run policy-aware exact source collation for KJV/NABRE/DRB.
Record Tobit KJV/NABRE/DRB partial trust only if exact collation passes.
Keep Tobit not fully trust-ready while NRSV/rawText/Rotherham remain unresolved.
